questions.question: permission_to_record
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for permission to record the conversation audio?
questions.evidence: 00:00:00.000 AGENT: ศูนย์รับแจ้งอุบัติเหตุทิพยประกันภัย สวัสดีค่ะ
questions.explanation: The agent did not ask for permission or inform the customer that the call was being recorded at the beginning of the conversation.

questions.question: vehicle_registration_verified
questions.criteria: Did the agent verify the correctness of the registered vehicle's license plate?
questions.evidence: 00:01:21.000 AGENT: Okay, your car is Honda CR-V.
questions.explanation: The agent verified the car model but did not ask for or verify the license plate number.

questions.question: ask_about_vehicle_damage
questions.criteria: Did the agent inquire about the damage to the insured vehicle (the conversation mentions the damage to the insured vehicle)?
questions.evidence: 00:00:11.000 AGENT: Yes. What can I help for you, sir? You have an accident, right?
questions.explanation: While the customer mentioned the car was bumped, the agent did not specifically inquire about the extent or location of the damage to the vehicle.

questions.question: verify_make_model
questions.criteria: Did the agent verify the correctness of the reported vehicle's brand/make?
questions.evidence: 00:01:21.000 AGENT: Okay, your car is Honda CR-V.
questions.explanation: The agent verified the car brand and model based on the policy information.

questions.question: ask_date_time_of_incident
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the date and time of the incident? (If the incident occurred on the same day as the report, asking only for the time is acceptable, or if the conversation can specify the date and time of the incident.)
questions.evidence: Throughout the transcript, there is no mention of the date or time of the incident.
questions.explanation: The agent did not ask the customer when the incident occurred.

questions.question: ask_driver_name_contact
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the driver's name and phone number? (The conversation can specify the driver's name and number.)
questions.evidence: 00:01:21.000 AGENT: ...And may I have your wife's phone number, sir? 00:01:39.000 AGENT: 07. It's a 096 992 2207, right?
questions.explanation: The agent asked for and verified the phone number of the driver (the customer's wife).

questions.question: ask_incident_description
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask about the nature/characteristics of the incident? (The conversation mentions the nature of the incident.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:11.000 AGENT: Yes. What can I help for you, sir? You have an accident, right?
questions.explanation: The agent asked if there was an accident but did not ask for the specific details or nature of how the incident occurred.

questions.question: surveyor_appointment_details_inquired
questions.criteria: Was the agent able to assign the job to the Surveyor correctly? (Check if the agent asked for the Appointment Place, Surveyor Appointed Date/time, or informed that they will coordinate for the staff to contact back.)
questions.evidence: 00:02:30.000 AGENT: No, I will call her and I will send our staff to her.
questions.explanation: The agent confirmed they would coordinate and send staff to the driver.

questions.question: ask_notifier_name_contact
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the caller's/notifier's name and number? (The conversation can specify the caller's name and number.)
questions.evidence: 00:01:13.000 AGENT: 94. The owner is Mr. Andrew, right?
questions.explanation: The agent verified the name of the caller (Mr. Andrew) through the policy information.

questions.question: ask_incident_location
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the location of the incident?
questions.evidence: 00:02:03.000 CUSTOMER: ...It's here in Bangkok, at Rama 4... 00:02:25.000 AGENT: Okay, sir. Okay, sir.
questions.explanation: The agent accepted the location details provided by the customer.

questions.question: agent_introduces_self
questions.criteria: Did the agent introduce themselves and the department? (Accident notification center followed by name, or name followed by accident notification center.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:00.000 AGENT: ศูนย์รับแจ้งอุบัติเหตุทิพยประกันภัย สวัสดีค่ะ
questions.explanation: The agent introduced the department (Accident Notification Center) but did not state their name.

questions.question: ask_other_party_registration
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask for the other party's license plate? [In case of an incident with another party] (If there is no other party, the answer is None.)
questions.evidence: Throughout the transcript, the agent does not ask for the other party's details.
questions.explanation: Despite the customer mentioning 'the other guy caused the accident', the agent did not ask for the other party's license plate.

questions.question: missed_call_callback
questions.criteria: In case of a dropped call, did the agent contact the customer back appropriately? (Answer is None only.)

questions.evidence: The agent does not mention a VDO survey.

questions.question: customer_complaint

questions.question: ask_car_driveable

questions.evidence: The agent did not ask about the car's condition or drivability.
questions.explanation: The agent failed to inquire if the vehicle was still drivable.

questions.question: ask_about_injuries
questions.criteria: Did the agent ask if anyone was injured from the incident?
questions.evidence: The transcript does not show the agent asking about injuries.
questions.explanation: The agent did not check for any injuries resulting from the accident.

questions.question: surveyor_info_recorded
questions.criteria: Was the surveying company's information recorded correctly? Was the surveyor's name and contact number recorded? (Answer is None only.)
questions.explanation: This information is not part of the external conversation transcript.

questions.question: agent_tone_and_language
questions.criteria: Did the agent use an appropriate tone of voice and words? (Describe the characteristics of the agent's tone of voice in detail.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:11.000 AGENT: Yes. What can I help for you, sir?
questions.explanation: The agent used professional and polite language throughout the call, maintaining a helpful tone in English.

questions.question: agent_listens_without_interruption
questions.criteria: Did the agent listen to the customer and not interrupt the conversation?
questions.evidence: 00:00:29.000 CUSTOMER: ...I think it's 0675... 00:01:01.000 AGENT: Is it start with 1000?
questions.explanation: The agent waited for the customer to finish searching for information before asking clarifying questions.

questions.question: agent_appropriate_interaction

questions.evidence: 00:02:30.000 AGENT: No, I will call her and I will send our staff to her.
questions.explanation: The agent interacted appropriately, providing solutions to the customer's requests.

questions.question: agent_eager_to_help_empathetic

questions.evidence: 00:00:11.000 AGENT: Yes. What can I help for you, sir?
questions.explanation: The agent showed a willingness to assist the customer immediately upon hearing about the accident.

questions.question: agent_emotion_control
questions.criteria: Did the agent control their emotions appropriately during the conversation?
questions.evidence: The agent maintained a 'professional' emotion tag throughout the interaction.
questions.explanation: The agent remained calm and professional even while the customer was anxious.

questions.question: agent_appropriate_hold
questions.criteria: Did the agent put the call on hold appropriately? (If there was no holding, the answer is None.)
questions.explanation: The call was not put on hold.

questions.question: accurate_complete_advice
questions.criteria: Did the agent provide advice and answer the customer's questions and objections accurately and completely? (Answer is None only.)

questions.question: agent_impressive_closing
questions.criteria: Did the agent end the conversation with an impressive sentence for the customer? Example sentences...

questions.explanation: The agent used a standard closing rather than the recommended impressive sentences like 'Take care' or 'Drive safely'.

questions.question: call_type
questions.criteria: Call Type (If the agent starts the sentence by introducing that they are contacting from Roojai, it is Outbound. If not, it is Inbound.)
questions.evidence: 00:00:00.000 AGENT: ศูนย์รับแจ้งอุบัติเหตุทิพยประกันภัย สวัสดีค่ะ
questions.explanation: The agent answered an incoming call from the customer.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: ศูนย์รับแจ้งอุบัติเหตุทิพยประกันภัย สวัสดีค่ะ

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Hello. I need to speak to somebody that can speak English for some assistance with an accident, please?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Yes. What can I help for you, sir? You have an accident, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yeah, the car is now on the road, and my wife is driving. I need someone there to go check. The other guy caused the accident. I just need someone there to go check, please.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Okay. And do you have the policy number, sir?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yeah, I do. Give me one second. Yes. Policy wording, welcome letter... I've got all these emails from you guys. Where is it? Where will I find it? It's all in Thai, that's the problem. Okay, hold on, give me one second. Welcome letter... I think it's 0675...

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Is it start with 1000?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: 75. Okay.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: 94. The owner is Mr. Andrew, right?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: That's me. That's me.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Okay, your car is Honda CR-V. And may I have your wife's phone number, sir?

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Yeah, maybe you can give her a call. She's there with the car now at the where the guy bumped her. She's there. Maybe you just get somebody to go and check. Normally they come on the motorbike, they can check the damage and everything like this.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Okay, sir. I will coordinate her.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Okay. You want to contact her? You've got the policy number and everything. She's there with the car now. It's here in Bangkok, at Rama 4. Rama 4 near Millennium Auto BMW, near K-Village, in between Asoke and Phrom Phong.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Okay, sir. Okay, sir.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: You can give her a call for me?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: No, I will call her and I will send our staff to her.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Okay. Thank you very much.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Okay, thank you. Bye-bye.

transcript.speaker: CUSTOMER
transcript.text: Bye-bye.
